name: Shells Shooter
short_description: A new sensation action game that blends coin pusher and shooting elements. Players take on the role of a crab, throwing shells to battle monsters born from ocean pollution while rescuing trapped fish. Utilize various skills to enjoy a thrilling coin pusher experience.
detailed_description:
🌟 Welcome to Shells Shooter! 🌟

Get ready for a splashy new adventure with Shells Shooter, a hilarious and action-packed fusion of coin pusher and shooter games! Players take on the role of Sandy the Crab, fighting against the monster Garbajo, born from ocean pollution, to rescue the trapped sea creatures and restore the beautiful ocean!

Game Features:


🦀 Crab Power! Throw shells to knock monsters flying and drop targets into the sea for an exhilarating experience! With plenty of coin pusher elements, it's easy and fun for everyone!
💥 Skill-Packed Action! Shoot shells rapidly to take down enemies, use super-speed sea urchins to defeat foes, and unleash a sushi explosion for a thrilling finale! Exciting coin pusher action awaits you!
🎨 Cute Visuals Enjoy vibrant, pop-style graphics with adorable anime characters and a colorful ocean backdrop for extra fun!
👾 Single Player Only Perfect for solo play—no need for friends, just dive in and have a blast on your own!
🌈 All Ages Welcome With simple coin pusher game rules that everyone has experienced, it’s fun for young and old alike!

Start your ocean adventure now with Shells Shooter! 🦑🌊

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Indonesian, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Swahili, Hindi
